posts.hook: Your eyes hurt after work. But is it eye strain — or is your prescription wrong?
posts.caption:
Eye strain and vision decline feel identical.

Both cause:
- Headaches
- Blurry vision
- Tired eyes by 3pm
- Difficulty focusing

The difference:

Eye strain → goes away after rest
Vision change → persists even after sleep

One test, 2 minutes: axeo.vision

If your score changes week over week — that's not strain.

#EyeStrain #VisionTest #EyeHealth #Axeo #HealthTok #DigitalEyeStrain #VisionChange

posts.hook: 5 signs your eyes need a real break this weekend — not just sleep.
posts.caption:
End-of-week eye assessment:

1. Can you read the bottom line of a Snellen chart easily?
   (If worse than Monday → screen fatigue)

2. Do letters blur when switching between phone and distance?
   (Accommodation lag — ciliary muscle fatigue)

3. Do bright lights feel more uncomfortable than usual?
   (Photophobia — common end-of-week symptom)

4. Are your eyes red and dry by 2pm?
   (Blink rate has dropped below 7/min)

5. Do you get headaches between the eyes?
   (Convergence fatigue)

If 3+ are yes: your eyes need active recovery, not just sleep.

Weekend recovery protocol: axeo.vision/exercise

#EyeStrain #WeekendRecovery #EyeHealth #Axeo #AxeoVision #DigitalDetox #EyeExercise

posts.hook: How to tell if your vision is actually changing — or just tired.
posts.caption:
Your eyes lie to you at the end of the week.

Temporary blur from screen fatigue feels identical to permanent vision change.

The only way to tell the difference: track your Snellen score consistently.

If your score:
✓ Returns to baseline after rest → eye strain
⚠️ Consistently worse by 1+ lines → prescription change
⚠️ Worse in one eye only → urgent ophthalmology referral

Axeo stores your weekly scores so you can spot patterns.

Test takes 2 minutes. Baseline established in 2 weeks.

Free at axeo.vision — no account required.

#EyeStrain #VisionTracking #EyeHealth #Axeo #AxeoVision #VisionTest #Optometry

posts.hook: All 6 Axeo vision tests — full walkthrough before the weekend.
posts.caption:
Take your weekly baseline before you disconnect for the weekend.

Axeo's 6 free vision tests:

1. Snellen acuity (2 min) — distance sharpness
2. Color vision (2 min) — Ishihara-style plates
3. Contrast sensitivity (90 sec) — low-light detection
4. Astigmatism check (1 min) — corneal irregularity
5. Amsler grid (30 sec) — macular health
6. Dry eye assessment (2 min) — OSDI questionnaire

Total time: ~10 minutes
Required: a browser, good lighting, no glasses during acuity test

All free at axeo.vision. No account. No download.

#VisionTest #EyeTest #EyeHealth #Axeo #FreeTest #Optometry #VisionCheck

posts.hook: Eye strain and vision decline are not the same thing. Here's a one-minute self-check.
posts.caption:
Friday afternoon self-test:

Ask yourself right now:
1. Cover right eye → read small text on your screen
2. Cover left eye → same
3. Look at something 20ft away → is it clear?
4. Blink 5 times deliberately → does blur improve?

If blur improves after blinking or after 5 min rest → eye strain
If blur persists through the weekend → your prescription may have changed

Track weekly at axeo.vision
Takes 2 minutes. Shows you patterns over time.
posts.visual_notes: Four-step self-test infographic. Teal numbered steps. Quick, actionable, shareable format. Axeo brand.

posts.hook: Your team has a vision problem — and it's costing you productivity every Friday afternoon.
posts.caption:
Remote work eye strain peaks on Friday afternoon.

A University of Alabama study found that visual discomfort and reduced acuity performance is 23% worse at the end of the work week vs Monday morning — in workers with no known vision problems.

This isn't a prescription issue.
It's cumulative ciliary muscle fatigue from sustained near work.

The cost:
→ Reduced reading speed Friday PM
→ Increased error rates in detail-heavy work
→ Higher reported headaches = more sick time

Three things that help:
1. One mandatory 20-20-20 screen break per hour (set team-wide reminders)
2. Ambient lighting that reduces screen-to-environment contrast ratio
3. Friday afternoon vision-forward work (calls vs documents)

Axeo provides team-level eye health tools including guided break reminders and weekly vision checks: axeo.vision

#RemoteWork #EmployeeWellness #EyeHealth #Productivity #DigitalWellbeing #HR
